name: ast-monorepo
description: Monorepo for Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) tools - JavaScript parser using ANTLR with extensible architecture

scripts.check:generated: cd packages/javascript && bun run antlr && git diff --exit-code -- src/generated && test -z "$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- src/generated)"
scripts.validate: biome check . && bun run check:generated && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
scripts.release: echo "Direct changeset publish is unsafe for workspace packages; use the Sylphx release workflow." && exit 1

author: Sylphx <hi@sylphx.com> (https://sylphx.com)
